title: Amir Cup 2025/2026 - Final
description: The Amir Cup is an association football tournament played every season by all first and second division teams in Qatar. Since its inception, the Amir Cup has been the dream of every player, team, coach, and club in Qatar. Al-Gharafa is the champion of 2025.

title: Montpellier vs Poitiers - Finals 2nd leg - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
description: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

title: Day 1 - World Athletics Relays - Gaborone 2026
description: Held in Gaborone, Botswana, bringing together national teams in the 4x100m, 4x400m and mixed 4x400m relays. The competition serves as a direct qualification route for the World Athletics Championships, with top teams securing places based on heat and final results.
